requirements.name: Written Service Provider Contract
requirements.description: A service provider or contractor must be bound by a written contract that prohibits the entity receiving personal information from retaining, using, or disclosing the personal information for any purpose other than the business purposes specified in the contract.
expected_provisions: Written contract specifies business purposes for which personal information is disclosed
Contract prohibits retention, use, or disclosure of personal information outside the specified business purposes
Contract prohibits combining personal information with information from other sources except as permitted

requirements.name: Prohibition on Selling or Sharing
requirements.description: Service provider or contractor shall not sell or share the personal information received from the business.
expected_provisions: Explicit prohibition on selling personal information
Explicit prohibition on sharing personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising
Commitment not to use personal information for purposes beyond the services provided

requirements.name: Compliance Notification and Cooperation
requirements.description: Service provider or contractor shall notify the business if it determines it can no longer meet its obligations under the CCPA and shall provide the business the right to take reasonable and appropriate steps to stop and remediate unauthorized use.
expected_provisions: Service provider notifies business if it can no longer meet CCPA obligations
Business has right to take steps to stop and remediate unauthorized use
Service provider cooperates with business to ensure CCPA compliance

requirements.name: Consumer Opt-Out Honoring
requirements.description: Service provider must honor consumer opt-out requests communicated by the business and must not use personal information that the business has disclosed is subject to an opt-out request.
expected_provisions: Service provider honors consumer opt-out signals communicated by business
Process for business to communicate consumer opt-out requests to service provider
Service provider does not use opt-out personal information for purposes other than contracted services

requirements.name: Subcontractor Flow-Down
requirements.description: If the service provider engages a subcontractor, it shall require the subcontractor to agree to the same restrictions and obligations imposed on the service provider by contract.
expected_provisions: Subcontractor engaged only with equivalent contractual obligations
Service provider remains responsible for subcontractor compliance
Business notified of material subcontractor changes

requirements.name: Assistance with Consumer Requests
requirements.description: Service provider shall assist the business in responding to consumer requests to know, delete, correct, and port personal information, and to opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information.
expected_provisions: Service provider assists business in responding to consumer access requests
Service provider deletes personal information upon business instruction per consumer request
Service provider assists with correction of inaccurate personal information
Reasonable timeframe for responding to consumer request assistance

requirements.name: Reasonable Security Measures
requirements.description: Businesses and service providers must implement and maintain reasonable security procedures and practices appropriate to the nature of the personal information to protect it from unauthorized or illegal access, destruction, use, modification, or disclosure.
expected_provisions: Reasonable security procedures and practices implemented
Security measures appropriate to the nature of the personal information
Protection against unauthorized access, destruction, use, modification, or disclosure

requirements.name: De-identification Requirements
requirements.description: If personal information is de-identified, the business or service provider must implement technical safeguards, business processes that prevent re-identification, and publicly commit to maintaining de-identification.
expected_provisions: Technical safeguards preventing re-identification
Business processes in place to prevent re-identification
Contractual commitment not to attempt re-identification of de-identified data
